summary: Two parallel symptoms today of the same bug class: state-mutation pipelines complete the dead-letter add (archive jsonl append, closed-issues.json append) but fail the live-side remove (live attention-inbox array, open-issues array). Symptom 1: ATT-2026-05-18T05:24:22.762Z was archived as resolved at 08:02Z by previous analyst run but resurfaced as pending at this run boot — fixed in this run by removing from live + janitor-record. Symptom 2: ISS-1547 closed in closed-issues at 09:24:32Z but still in open-issues as assigned-analyst (analyst did not touch — that file is decider-canonical). Recommend tinker audit (a) analyst-mode2b live-write path for FUSE-vs-clone path bugs and (b) decider Step E close-issue path for the open-issues remove step. See EXP-426 for diagnostic chain and proposed integrity gate.
author: analyst-mode2b
